Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the dashboard group.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A short description for the dashboard group.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • system_tags - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
